mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCKS WHERE QUANTITY <= SAFETY_STOCK
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INBOUNDS WHERE INBOUND_DATE = CURDATE() AND STATUS = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OUTBOUNDS WHERE OUTBOUND_DATE = CURDATE() AND STATUS = 'COMPLETED'

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(OD.TOTAL_PRICE), 0) FROM OUTBOUNDS O JOIN OUTBOUND_DETAILS OD ON O.OUTBOUND_ID = OD.OUTBOUND_ID WHERE O.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND O.OUTBOUND_TYPE = 'SALE' AND YEAR(O.OUTBOUND_DATE) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(O.OUTBOUND_DATE) = MONTH(CURDATE())

SELECT H.HISTORY_ID AS historyId, H.HISTORY_TYPE AS historyType, H.BEFORE_QUANTITY AS beforeQuantity, H.CHANGE_QUANTITY AS changeQuantity, H.AFTER_QUANTITY AS afterQuantity, H.REMARK AS remark, H.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, I.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, U.NAME AS processUserName FROM STOCK_HISTORIES H JOIN ITEMS I ON H.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID JOIN WAREHOUSES W ON H.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID JOIN USERS U ON H.PROCESS_USER_ID = U.USER_ID ORDER BY H.HISTORY_ID DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT S.STOCK_ID AS stockId, I.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, S.QUANTITY AS quantity, S.SAFETY_STOCK AS safetyStock FROM STOCKS S JOIN ITEMS I ON S.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID JOIN WAREHOUSES W ON S.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE S.QUANTITY <= S.SAFETY_STOCK ORDER BY (S.QUANTITY - S.SAFETY_STOCK) ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT S.STOCK_ID AS stockId, I.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, S.QUANTITY AS quantity, S.SAFETY_STOCK AS safetyStock FROM STOCKS S JOIN ITEMS I ON S.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID JOIN WAREHOUSES W ON S.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID ORDER BY S.QUANTITY DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT I.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, SUM(OD.QUANTITY) AS salesQuantity, SUM(OD.TOTAL_PRICE) AS salesAmount FROM OUTBOUNDS O JOIN OUTBOUND_DETAILS OD ON O.OUTBOUND_ID = OD.OUTBOUND_ID JOIN ITEMS I ON OD.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE O.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND O.OUTBOUND_TYPE = 'SALE' AND YEAR(O.OUTBOUND_DATE) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(O.OUTBOUND_DATE) = MONTH(CURDATE()) GROUP BY I.ITEM_ID, I.ITEM_CODE, I.ITEM_NAME ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT D.BASE_MONTH AS label, IFNULL(I.INBOUND_COUNT, 0) AS inboundCount, IFNULL(O.OUTBOUND_COUNT, 0) AS outboundCount FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-01') AS BASE_MONTH UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-02') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-03') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-04') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-05') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-06') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-07') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-08') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-09') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-10') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-11') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-12') ) D LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(INBOUND_DATE, '%Y-%m') AS YM, COUNT(*) AS INBOUND_COUNT FROM INBOUNDS WHERE STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND YEAR(INBOUND_DATE) = YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(INBOUND_DATE, '%Y-%m') ) I ON D.BASE_MONTH = I.YM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(OUTBOUND_DATE, '%Y-%m') AS YM, COUNT(*) AS OUTBOUND_COUNT FROM OUTBOUNDS WHERE STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND YEAR(OUTBOUND_DATE) = YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(OUTBOUND_DATE, '%Y-%m') ) O ON D.BASE_MONTH = O.YM ORDER BY D.BASE_MONTH

SELECT D.BASE_MONTH AS label, IFNULL(S.SALES_AMOUNT, 0) AS salesAmount FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-01') AS BASE_MONTH UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-02') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-03') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-04') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-05') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-06') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-07') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-08') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-09') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-10') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-11') UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-12') ) D LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(O.OUTBOUND_DATE, '%Y-%m') AS YM, SUM(OD.TOTAL_PRICE) AS SALES_AMOUNT FROM OUTBOUNDS O JOIN OUTBOUND_DETAILS OD ON O.OUTBOUND_ID = OD.OUTBOUND_ID WHERE O.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND O.OUTBOUND_TYPE = 'SALE' AND YEAR(O.OUTBOUND_DATE) = YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(O.OUTBOUND_DATE, '%Y-%m') ) S ON D.BASE_MONTH = S.YM ORDER BY D.BASE_MONTH
